case_title: CALIFORNIA CARPET VS NICORA, WILLIAM PAUL IND/DBA WP NICORA CONST.

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT NICORA, WILLIAM PAUL IND/DBA WP NICORA CONST.
